title: Strip in-process rate limiting, delegate to reverse proxy
description: Deployment invariant: smallhold runs behind Caddy (or nginx/ALB). Strip LOGIN_ATTEMPTS HashMap and check_login_rate_limit() from api.rs (~30 lines). Strip rate limit check from webauthn.rs. Replace with ponytail comment: 'login rate limiting delegated to reverse proxy (Caddy rate_limit, nginx limit_req_zone)'. The in-memory HashMap doesn't survive restarts and is trivially bypassed by rotating IPs. Caddy's rate_limit directive is superior in every way. Reference: gaja commit 3cf3634.
